description: Black to play the best endgame move. A theme gleaned from a game played on KGS.
sgf:
(
;AB [ea][db][fb][hb][dc][hc][ed][id][ee][fe][ie][ef][cg][eg][fg][gg][dh][di]
AW [eb][ec][fc][fd][hd][ge][ff][gf][if][hg][eh][fh][gh][hh][ei] C[black to play the best endgame move.] SZ[9]

     (;B[gd] ;W[gc]
          (;B[gb]
               (;W[gd] ;B[hf] C[RIGHT CHOICE Correct.])
               (;W[he] C[CHOICE]
                    (;B[ic] ;W[hf] ;B[gd] C[RIGHT Correct.])
                    (;B[gd] ;W[ic] C[Black can do a bit better.])
               )
          )
          (;B[he] ;W[gd] 
               (;B[ic] ;W[hf] C[Black can do better.])
               (;B[gb] ;W[hf] C[Black can do better.])
          )
          (;B[hf] ;W[he]
               (;B[gb] ;W[ic]
                    (;B[ib] ;W[gd] C[Black can do better.])
                    (;B[gd] ;W[ib] C[Black can do better.])
               )
               (;B[ic] ;W[hf] C[Black can do better.])
          )
     )

     (;B[gc]
          (;W[gd] ;B[hf] C[RIGHT CHOICE Correct.])
          (;W[he] C[CHOICE]
               (;B[gd] ;W[ic] C[Black can do better.])
               (;B[ic] ;W[hf] ;B[gd] C[RIGHT Correct.])
          )
          (;W[hf] 
               (;B[gd] ;W[he] ;B[ic] C[RIGHT CHOICE Correct.])
               (;B[ic] ;W[gd] C[Black can do better.])
          )
     )


     (;B[gb] ;W[gd] C[Black can do better.])
     (;B[he] ;W[gd] 
          (;B[gc] ;W[hf] C[Black can do better.])
          (;B[ic] ;W[hf] C[Black can do better.])
     )
     (;B[hf] ;W[he]
          (;B[ic] ;W[hf] C[Black can do better.])
          (;B[gc] ;W[ic]
               (;B[gd] ;W[ib] C[Black can do better.])
               (;B[ib] ;W[gd] C[Black can do better.])
          )
          (;B[gd] ;W[ic]
               (;B[gc] ;W[ib] C[Black can do better.])
               (;B[ib] ;W[gc] C[Black can do better.])
          )
     )
     (;B[ic] ;W[gd] 
          (;B[gc] ;W[hf] C[Black can do better.])
          (;B[he] ;W[hf] C[Black can do better.])
          (;B[hf] ;W[he] C[Black can do better.])
     )
)

collections.name: Best move with letting enemy live
